feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: odataVersion 4.01 prevents app from being imported into Work Zone HTML5 Apps
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have a UI5 app that uses an OData service, and the odataVersion in manifest.json is set to 4.01.

      "mainService": {
        "uri": "/odata/v4/quote/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "annotations": [
            "annotation"
          ],
          "localUri": "localService/mainService/metadata.xml",
          "odataVersion": "4.01"
        }
      }

When I deploy this app to Cloud Foundry and refresh the Channel Manager in SAP Build Work Zone, the app fails to be imported, and the downloaded report contains the following error:

 
businessapp does not match the schema, dataPath: undefined, message: 'must be equal to one of the allowed values' [ '2.0', '4.0' ]"

Changing odataVersion to 4.0 makes the import succeed.

I believe this is a bug in Work Zone. I hope it will be fixed, but I am sharing this in case others are facing the same issue.

entry.title: Duplicate apps appearing on the Work Zone page
entry.content:
Hi community,

When adding a UI5 app deployed to the HTML5 App Repository to a page in SAP Build Work Zone, the same application appears twice in the "Add Apps" dialog. One entry shows the system as "saas_approuter" and the other shows "saas_approuter" followed by an additional string (what appears to be a GUID).

When I select the entry with the additional string, the app does not appear on the site after being added.

This duplicate entry with the appended string started appearing recently, and I would like to understand why it is showing up.

entry.title: Dynamic Tile KPI in SAP Build Work Zone routes to HTML5 runtime destination instead of CAP backend
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am facing an issue while configuring a dynamic KPI tile in SAP Build Work Zone. In my project, the site is deployed using CDM (cdm.json) to define the site structure, apps, and tiles. The KPI is configured in the application manifest.json through indicatorDataSource, as described in the SAP documentation and this blog :

 

"indicatorDataSource": {
	"dataSource": "<service>",
	"path": "<handler>",
	"refresh": 600
}

 

The tile shows "... Error" and the request fails with a 500 Internal Server Error. From the browser Network tab, I can see that the KPI request is routed through a URL like: ".../dynamic_dest/<destination-rt>/<AppID>/~/odata/...".

Here, <destination-rt> is the destination that points to the HTML5 Application Repository runtime. However, the OData service used for the KPI is exposed by my CAP backend service (<destination-srv-api>), not by the HTML5 app runtime. If I call the backend OData endpoint directly (by removing the "/dynamic_dest/<destination-rt>" part of the URL), the service responds correctly. 

So my assumption is that the indicatorDataSource request is being resolved through the runtime destination of the HTML5 app instead of the backend destination that exposes the CAP service.

Has anyone encountered this behavior in a CDM-based Work Zone setup? Is there a recommended way to make the dynamic tile call the backend destination/service instead of the HTML5 runtime destination?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Enhancement Ideas on SAP Build Work Zone - Permission, Workspace Admin, Content Approval
entry.content:
Hello Work Zone users and administrators,

As our company also started using SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition as an "intranet" as a start, there are few opportunities of enhancement that, we think, will greatly help large scale organisations with complex matrix and content management to adopt the product more effectively.

We have raised few enhancement requests and wish you take few mins to vote and support our ideas to SAP.

(1) Select which Sub-workspace the User be Made Workspace Admin WHEN Making User Main Workspace Admin
Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence
(#371329)
Currently, when a user is made Workspace Admin for the a main workspace, the user is also automatically made Workspace Admin in ALL the sub-workspaces that are nested under that main workspace.

We proposed to enhance to prompt to allow the admin to select which sub-workspace(s) should the user be made workspace admin WHEN making him/her Workspace Admin for the main workspace.

The proposed enhancement will address the following problem:

(1) For companies that will use sub-workspaces as departmental/sectional site, this enhancement will prevent a user (who is a representative of a department) to have unnecessary/excessive admin right for other sub-workspace(s).

(2) With this enhancement, the access to a private folder created in a departmental/sectional sub-workspace will only truly be accessible to the relevant Workspace Admin(s), instead of all the workspace admin that inherits the right from the main workspace, bring more meanings to create a private folder.

(3) This enhancement will allow the departmental user to maintain the right to mirror content from their responsible sub-workspace (folders) to the Main Workspace (folders) which serves as the HOME of a company site to display content that comes from the department, at the same time ensuring a stricter admin permission on sub-workspace level.

The proposed enhancement will allow smoother dynamics of content sharing and folder management, and adopt flexible workspace administrator matrix to cope with more complex organisation structure that naturally needs to invite more content owner to come into play.

(2) Mirror Multiple Content to Multiple Destination Folder at a Time
Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence
(#371324)

Currently, workspace admin can only mirror content/file to a destination folder one by one.

We propose to enhance the platform to allow mirroring multiple content/file to multiple destination folders within/across workspaces/sub-workspaces at a time.

The proposed enhancement will great reduce the time spent in mirroring a certain volume of content/files to multiple workspaces, drastically reduce the clicks and navigation in the content/files mirroring process.

This would be greatly beneficial to large scale companies/conglomerates with multiple workspaces for their subsidiaries/business units who have central content owner who is responsible for distributing global content/files to those sub-workspaces. Currently, it is very painful for the global content owners to mirror content one by one with repetitive clicks and navigation.

(3) Set Content Approval Not only for Workspace with Full Collaboration Level
Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence
(#360103)

Currently, only when a workspace collaboration level is set to 'Full', can content approval be configured for that workspace.  In cases where a workspace is set to 'Read Only' and only workspace admin can publish content (e.g. blog post), it will be beneficial to allow content approval on workspace admin level to facilitate and ensure content governance before the content gets published to the general members.    This will lessen the content drafting, editing and reviewing off the platform and offline back-and-forth communication.

In cases where a workspace is set to 'Read Only' and only workspace admin can publish content (e.g. blog post), it will be beneficial to allow content approval on workspace admin level to facilitate and ensure content governance before the content gets published to the general members.

We strongly believe companies that use WorkZone as one-way communication and that has strong and strict content publishing guideline would be beneficial from this suggestion. This suggestion will add a layer to ensure content aligns the company's tone and style before the content gets published within the WorkZone application.

Thank you for reading through and your vote!

Cheers,
Max

entry.title: Custom Visualization error "Cannot load tile"
entry.content:
I have followed below thread for Implement a Custom Visualization Tile Launchpad,
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/implement-a-custom-visualization-tile-launchpad/qaq-p/12483243

Created
1. VisualAPP
2. TargetApp

In BTP Workzone, I don't see target app in page to assign; where as i can add to a group/role/catalog

In site settings, I have set the Asynchronous Module Loading as No.

How to add app in pages?
In targetApp, manifest.json added below lines, after that i dont see in pages to assign.

 "sap.cloud.portal": {      
     "ztargetsem-display": {
         "vizType": "zvisualtilemodule"
      }
    }

how to enable the app in page?
Please advise.

entry.title: Build Work Zone: No Content Items Created from S/4HANA FLP Content Exposure (0/0)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently integrating SAP Build Work Zone (Standard Edition) with an SAP S/4HANA on‑premise system using Launchpad Content Exposure to SAP BTP (Exposure Version 2).

Although the content exposure in S/4HANA seems to be set up correctly, no content items are created in Build Work Zone after channel synchronization.

Observed Behavior

  • The FLP Content Exposure runs successfully in S/4HANA
  • JSON content is generated for:
    • Business Apps
    • Catalogs
    • Groups
    • Roles
  • In Build Work Zone → Channel Manager, the channel status shows Updated
  • However, the Channel Report shows:

    Content Items: 0 / 0
    No content items were created or updated

Expected Behavior

  • Catalogs, apps, and groups exposed from S/4HANA should be converted into content items in Build Work Zone and become available for site usage.

Configuration Details

  • S/4HANA FLP content includes:
    • Business apps (homepage, search)
    • Catalogs assigned to roles
    • Role created specifically for Build Work Zone consumption
  • Content exposure uses Exposure Version 2
  • Channel is created in Build Work Zone in automatic mode
  • Cloud connector and destination setup is in place

Checks Already Done

  • Verified that FLP catalogs are assigned to the role
  • Verified that the role is included in content exposure
  • Channel synchronization completes without errors
  • No errors in BWZ logs, only empty content result

Questions

  1. Which technical roles are mandatory for the S/4HANA user (or technical integration user) to allow Build Work Zone to read FLP content?
  2. Is any additional role required for content item generation?
  3. Are there additional authorization objects (e.g. /UI2/FLP_CONT) that are required?
  4. Are there known prerequisites or limitations when using Exposure Version 2 with Build Work Zone?
  5. Any checks or logs you would recommend to identify why content items are not being generated?

Any guidance or pointers would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Please find the screenshots below for your reference.

Kind regards,
Om Prakash Jha

entry.title: Why don't named anchors work in Work Zone?
entry.content:
Why can't a drop a named anchor into a block of text in Work Zone? 

E.g.

<p>lots of text text text ... <a name ="section2">Section 2</a> text text text...</p>

I can write this into a text widget using the view source function, but if a link to this anchor is clicked elsewhere it doesn't jump the page to the anchor - it doesn't work like normal basic HTML works. 

This is annoying, there are lots of instances I'd like to link to content halfway down a page, as you can probably imagine for long knowledgebase articles. 

Please make named anchors work.

entry.title: KPI indicatorDataSource routing error: Service targeting <destination-rt> instead of <destination-sr
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing an issue while configuring a dynamic KPI tile in SAP Build Work Zone. In my project, the site is deployed using CDM (cdm.json) to define the site structure, apps, and tiles. The KPI is configured in the application manifest.json through indicatorDataSource, as described in the SAP documentation and this blog :

 

 

 

The tile shows "... Error" and the request fails with a 500 Internal Server Error. From the browser Network tab, I can see that the KPI request is routed through a URL like: ".../dynamic_dest/<destination-rt>/<AppID>/~/odata/...".
Here, <destination-rt> is the destination that points to the HTML5 Application Repository runtime. However, the OData service used for the KPI is exposed by my CAP backend service (<destination-srv-api>), not by the HTML5 app runtime. If I call the backend OData endpoint directly (by removing the "/dynamic_dest/<destination-rt>" part of the URL), the service responds correctly.

entry.title: What happens to federated Content SAP Work Zone, when onPremise System is in maintenance?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Dev Community,

We have successfully running SAP Work Zone (Standard Edition) with content federation. Everything works fine with the S4 content federation sync and principal propagation config.

Currently, we ran into one issue... When the source of our content federation (an onPremise S4 HANA system)  is temporary not available. The enduser (application/business user) still can see the app tile and can even click within the SAP Work Zone dashboard. If the enduser clicks the app tile (with a federated app), then a pretty bad error message appears (request can't be processed). What is the SAP official recommended solution for this maintenance mode  scenario of federated Fiori Apps?

In my opinion it is pretty common scenario, that SAP onPremise systems are temporary not available due maintenance.  I could not find any option in SAP Work Zone Content Explorer or other Admin UI within the Site Manager to deactiviate App Tiles for a short predefined time period. As far as I know, the SAP Work Zone does not have an official Web API (REST, SOAP oder something else) to deactivate App Tiles.

Our planned workaround would be the development of a custom SAP Work Zone Shell Plugin. That shell plugin checks if the content federated app is available. If not, then the App Tile will be disabled on the fly. But even that workaround is kinda nasty, since the APIs around sap.ushell.renderers.fiori2.Renderer & sap.ushell.services.LaunchPage are deprecated. From a developer point of view, I can't imagine that SAP forgot to develop an UX pattern for this kind of scenario.

Does anyone know an official SAP recommended implementation for this kind of issue?

Thx in advance and all the best,

FloW

entry.title: SAP build workzone
entry.content:
Hello all, Good Day,

Can we able the customize the buildworkzone login page in btp ?

Thanks,
Siva D

entry.title: Problem with workzone text widget display
entry.content:
What's happened with how text widgets display edit mode??!

It used to be the case that editing a text widget displayed all the text in the editable panel - often a very tall panel for pages with lots of text.

Since about a week ago, now when I select to edit a text widget, it displays a truncated version of the text - 20 lines or so. Any editing of the text snaps the text widget to display full height - which is necessary as there's no way to scroll the widget otherwise. 

This means that my first action when editing a text widget is to enter a line break somewhere then immediately delete it, which forces the widget to go full height. This is super annoying. 

I'm using Edge on Windows. In experimenting whilst writing this I've found it only happens with a browser zoom set to 100%. If I shrink or expand the browser zoom the text widget in edit mode snaps to the correct height. 

Attached - screengrab showing the truncated text widget in edit more. The amount of text in this widget is many times greater than that exposed in the widget.

Please sort this out.

entry.title: Work Zone trial login fails - aig6etlfo IDP activation email not received
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using SAP BTP Trial and cannot login to SAP Build Work Zone.

Problem: My trial account has a custom IDP aig6etlfo.trial-accounts.ondemand.com which was auto-created. When I try to login to Work Zone, it redirects to this IDP. I never received an activation email for this IDP tenant.

What I tried:

  • Clicked "Forgot Password" multiple times — no email received
  • Created user manually in BTP Cockpit under aig6etlfo IDP — still no activation email
  • Cannot access aig6etlfo admin console
  • Cannot delete the IDP trust because Work Zone is using it

BTP Trial details:

  • Subaccount: 4b4624aftrial
  • Region: AP21 Singapore
  • Email: kartiknikumbh11@gmail.com

How can I either:

  1. Get the activation email for aig6etlfo IDP, or
  2. Force Work Zone to use the Default identity provider instead?

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM | Implementation | CDM | SAP Launchpad Application
entry.content:
In a SAP Cloud ALM tenant, one of the landscapes has been set up with the change and deployment management module to manage transport requirements for SAP S4HANA, SAP CPI systems, and the SAP launchpad system. 

 

For above mentioned CPI and Launchpad system, the SAP cloud transport management system (CTMS) is already integrated into the SAP cloud alm tool via the SAP BTP cockpit.

CTS is enabled for S4HANA system.

 

I can view all the systems of above-mentioned sap applications in the landscape management of SAP cloud ALM administration Console. 

 

The system groups and deployment plans are in place. In system group for launchpad system we have tried with two products as SAP BTP cloud foundry environment  and SAP build work zone, standard edition

For the  SAP CPI we have selected product as SAP integration suite.

 

We can create features and add transport for the S/4HANA and CPI systems in the Features app.

However, when adding transport for the Launchpad system and selecting the 'Assign' button in the Features app, none of the transports of  Launchpad systems are getting listed. Rest of the systems S4HANA and CPI are listed, but the Launchpad system is not.  

 

Checked following :

Flag of “controlled by Solution Manager” is not set for Dev and UAT system, though for the prod system is set, but as of now not able to view the Dev or UAT in the list while assigning the transport.

Same CTMS is already leveraged for CPI systems, and no issues are observed nor encounter any errors for CPI transports.

In LMS of Cloud ALM, the attempt to create endpoint creation is throwing error stating endpoint creation is not required for SAP build work zone standard edition as none of the CALM use cases requires endpoint.

entry.title: Standard Price
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I created ROH material for plant & noticed in Accounting 1. I'm not getting the options to update the standard price but getting the options to update moving price. ML type is uncheck and price determination is greyed.

 

Where as for another plant I can update standard price.

What could b the root cause?

How to be fixe?

 

Expert comments please

entry.title: Application could not be started due to technical issues. "h.loaded is not a function"
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing an issue with a RAP Fiori Elements application running in SAP Build Work Zone.

Scenario

  1. Open my My Inbox (Integrate with SAP Build Process Automation).
  2. Go back to the Work Zone home (or use the browser Back button).
  3. Open the RAP application.

The application fails to start and shows the following error:

Has anyone experienced a similar issue with SAP Build Work Zone or Launchpad navigation?

Any suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to set up the new shell bar using the cdm.json?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently working on a multi target application (Cloud Foundry + build work zone). The website is set up through a cdm.json, so the site editor does not allow for manual modification - it systematically returns an error. This is mostly OK since every details is code-based and pogramatically set in the cdm.json.

Recently I have been trying to deal with a warning I keep getting about the rolling out of a new shell bar, which will need some set up, but I can't find any documentation on this.

Has anyone managed to set up this new shell bar through the cdm? And if yes, how did you do it? 

Thanks in advance for your help, 

Best, 

Theodore

entry.title: Unexpected Connections Consumption in SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently implementing a Supplier Portal using SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition.

Our current subscription includes:

1,000 Active Users
0 Connections

Authentication is performed through SAP Cloud Identity Services (Identity Authentication - IAS) as our Identity Provider (IdP).

Due to an omission during the commercial contracting process, our subscription was provisioned with Active Users only, while the Connections metric was not included. We are already discussing this situation with our SAP Account Team, but we would like to better understand both the technical behavior and whether anyone has experienced a similar situation.

During our testing, we observed that every external login generates Connections, even though our subscription does not include this metric.

From a technical perspective, we would like to know:

1. Is the generation of the Connections metric mandatory in SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition?
2. Is there any way to completely prevent the generation of the Connections metric through Role Collections, authorizations or SAP Build Work Zone configuration?

From a commercial perspective, we would also appreciate guidance from anyone who has experienced a similar situation.

Any guidance or shared experience would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone Licensing vs HTML5 Application Repository for External Users
entry.content:
We are currently using SAP Build Work Zone to provide access to our SAPUI5 application. However, we have observed a very high consumption of Connections from external users, which has significantly increased our licensing costs.

As an alternative, we are evaluating an architecture where the SAPUI5 application is hosted in the HTML5 Application Repository and accessed through a custom AppRouter, without using SAP Build Work Zone.

In this scenario:

  • Would access to the application still generate SAP Build Work Zone licensing consumption (such as Connections or Active Users)?
  • If not, which SAP BTP services and metrics would be considered for billing instead?
  • Is using the HTML5 Application Repository without SAP Build Work Zone a recommended approach for reducing licensing costs in scenarios with a large number of external users?

We have reviewed the available SAP documentation, but it is not entirely clear how licensing and billing behave in this specific architecture.

Any clarification, documentation references, or recommendations from SAP or the community would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Does Accessing Applications Hosted in HTML5 Application Repository Incur Costs?
entry.content:
We are trying to better understand the licensing model for applications hosted in the HTML5 Application Repository.

Does accessing an application deployed in the HTML5 Application Repository generate any licensing or usage charges by itself?

If so:

  • Which SAP BTP service is responsible for the billing?
  • How is the usage measured (e.g., requests, active users, connections, storage, runtime, etc.)?
  • Is there any difference in the billing model when the application is accessed through a custom AppRouter instead of SAP Build Work Zone?

The reason for this question is that we are evaluating replacing SAP Build Work Zone due to the high licensing costs associated with external user connections. We would like to understand whether using the HTML5 Application Repository directly would avoid those charges or simply shift the costs to another BTP service.

Any clarification or references to the official SAP documentation would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: work zone Standard Edition: Local copy of tile assigned to role and Group/Catalog in not visible
entry.content:
Hi There,

We in a UI5 migration project from NEO to Cloud Foundry.

Scenario:
In neo we have an app configured as 2 tiles with different visualization, because of user Group.
Now in CF and Work zone standard edition, we tried below and none worked.

  1. Defined 2 inbound intents in manifest, but in work zone displays single app/tile with 1st intent only, we raised a ticket with SAP and they said this is not supported.
  2. We deployed app with 1st visualization, created a local copy. then redeployed with 2nd visualization.
  • In work zone I could see both the tiles now as expected.
  • I could assign the tiles to roles, catalogs and groups, no issues as such.
  • But in Launch pad I couldn't see the local copy version with 1st visualization.

Have someone tried such scenario? I couldn't find any solution as such yet.

Other than marinating 2 apps, dual maintenance and technical debt.
Please advise.

Thank you,

Sai
